Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: No bare spots anywhere- skied the red loop - a hard pack very well groomed base with an inch of  fresh on top. . Snow was granular , high moisture and a bit sticky for my wax , HF7 : but I bet others got it right . Bluebird day on a great trail !

nubsNob.xcTrails: Will be groomed and tracked this morning.
nubsNob.nightSkiing: Night Skiing is Tuesday thru Saturday from 5:30 to 9:00 p.m. The final day of night skiing is March 14.
nubsNob.comments: Over an inch of snow landed at Nub's last night and conditions have improved tremendously. The snow is machine groomed and should be great for skiing and riding. It looks like a lot more natural snow is headed our way over the next few days. The soup of the day is beef barley. Pintail Peak is open with food service and an espresso bar. The lifts will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. today with an hour break at 4:30 p.m. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
